name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】MiuMiu Mini Tote is now online. Totally irresistible for mini lovers, so cute! Super mini, who doesn't love it? Can be worn crossbody or on the waist, and looks great with large bag charms. Miu really understands women.
